sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, there Supplementary
sections.text:
may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic, such Appropriation
monies not exceeding in the aggregate two billion, eight hundred
and seventy-three million, six hundred and fifty-nine thousand, one
hundred and thirty-two kwacha indicated in respect of the services
of the Republic specified in the third column of the First and Second
Schedules being expenditure in excess of the monies appropriated
for the services of the Republic during the financial year ending on
31st December, 2017.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price KJ2.00 each.
